draft_prompts.data_discovery: Locate the NOAA dataset containing historical fire data from 2000 onwards. Verify that it includes information on total acres burned for each period.
draft_prompts.data_wrangler: Extract the period with the highest total acres burned from the NOAA dataset. Calculate the total acres burned for that period.
draft_prompts.analyst: Verify that the extracted period indeed holds the record for highest total acres burned. Provide a summary of the analysis.
draft_prompts.reporter: Compile the results into a concise report. Include the identified period with the highest total acres burned and the corresponding value.
